description: Evals for the convert-to-markdown skill — tests correct identification of file/URL type and appropriate use of markitdown, youtube-transcript, web-to-md, or mhtml-to-md tools.

evals.name: Convert PDF report to Markdown
evals.description: User provides a local .pdf file and asks for its content in markdown format. The skill should use `uvx markitdown` on the PDF path.
evals.prompt: I have a PDF report at ./reports/quarterly-report-2024.pdf that I need to review as Markdown. Can you convert it for me?
expectedBehavior: Agent recognizes the .pdf extension and selects `uvx markitdown`
Runs `uvx markitdown ./reports/quarterly-report-2024.pdf` (or writes output to a file with `-o`)
Presents or saves the resulting markdown content
successCriteria: Headings, paragraphs, and tables from the PDF are preserved in structure
No hallucinated content beyond what was in the PDF

evals.name: Convert Word document to Markdown
evals.description: User provides a .docx file and wants it converted. The skill should use `uvx markitdown` on the DOCX path.
evals.prompt: Can you turn this Word doc into markdown? ./docs/proposal.docx
expectedBehavior: Agent identifies .docx as a supported format for `uvx markitdown`
successCriteria: Output is valid Markdown preserving document structure (headings, lists, tables)
No content hallucinated beyond what was in the DOCX

evals.name: Extract YouTube video transcript
evals.description: User provides a YouTube URL and wants the transcript. The skill should use the `./scripts/youtube-transcript` script.
evals.prompt: I need the transcript from this YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ — can you grab it for me?
expectedBehavior: Agent identifies a YouTube URL and selects `./scripts/youtube-transcript`
Runs the script with the provided URL
successCriteria: Output contains readable transcript text from the video
If --info flag used, metadata (title, channel) is included
Agent does not attempt to use `uvx markitdown` on a YouTube URL (wrong tool)

evals.name: Convert web page to Markdown via Crawl4AI
evals.description: User provides a regular website URL and wants it as markdown. The skill should use `./scripts/web-to-md` (assuming Crawl4AI server is available).
evals.prompt: Convert this webpage to markdown: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Markdown
expectedBehavior: Agent identifies a regular HTTP URL and selects `./scripts/web-to-md`
Checks for Crawl4AI server availability or notes the prerequisite
successCriteria: Output is valid Markdown with headings, paragraphs, and links preserved
Agent does not attempt `uvx markitdown` on a live URL (wrong tool for this case)
If Crawl4AI server isn't running, agent notes the prerequisite or falls back to saving HTML + using markitdown

evals.name: Convert Excel spreadsheet to Markdown tables
evals.description: User provides an .xlsx file and wants it converted. The skill should use `uvx markitdown`.
evals.prompt: I need the data from this spreadsheet as markdown: ./data/sales-2024.xlsx
expectedBehavior: Presents the resulting markdown with tables for each sheet
successCriteria: Output contains Markdown tables representing spreadsheet data
Multiple sheets appear as separate sections/tables in the output

evals.name: Convert MHTML file to Markdown
evals.description: User provides an .mhtml file and wants it converted. The skill should use `./scripts/mhtml-to-md`.
evals.prompt: Convert this saved web archive to markdown: ./saved/page.mhtml
successCriteria: Output is valid Markdown from the MHTML content
Agent does not use `uvx markitdown` on .mhtml (wrong tool per skill docs)

evals.name: Extract text from image via OCR
evals.description: User provides an image file and wants the text content. The skill should use `uvx markitdown` which handles images with EXIF + OCR.
expectedBehavior: Agent identifies .jpg as an image and selects `uvx markitdown`
Presents the extracted text (EXIF metadata + OCR)
successCriteria: Output includes any readable text from the image via OCR
EXIF metadata is included if present

evals.name: Convert CSV to Markdown table
evals.description: User provides a .csv file and wants it as markdown. The skill should use `uvx markitdown`.
evals.prompt: Turn this CSV into a nice markdown table: ./data/users.csv
successCriteria: Output is a properly formatted Markdown table
Headers and data rows are preserved correctly
